title: My plugins resource pack
description: Adds all the textures required in my plugin.
body:
# **Summary**
Adds all the textures needed in my plugins. If you aren't using all of my plugins, you can still download this pack without having any issues.

## More info: [**Wikis**](https://github.com/GreeFoxTheDev) of plugins, [**Discord server**](https://discord.gg/tXJcWx92HM)

Plugins currently used for this pack:
 - [**Copper Items**](https://modrinth.com/plugin/copper-items)
 - [**Daggers**](https://modrinth.com/plugin/daggers_greefox)
 - [**Katanas**](https://modrinth.com/mod/katanas)

#### **Note:** More info can be seen in description of my plugins.
